packageRules.description: Keep log4j artifacts version-aligned. Only log4j-core published 3.0.0-beta3; log4j-api and log4j-slf4j2-impl cap at beta2 on Central, so an independent core bump to beta3 yields NoSuchMethodError ServiceLoaderUtil.safeStream at runtime. Skip the orphan beta3 until api/slf4j2-impl catch up.
